But before we get everyone in a room to finalize everything, I really, truly need to make sure that foundation is rock-solid for *everyone*.

So, yes, the consolidation is coming, and your input will be vital, Takahashi-san. But first, I *must* speak with Sato-san to fully understand her specific concerns. Once I'm confident that we've smoothed out any core alignment issues, then we can have that incredibly productive, final department session you're looking forward to.
